case_title: ZAYATS, BORIS VS PACIFIC SERICES, INC. DBA PACIFIC TAXI CAB

docket_entries.description: PLTFF FILING MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION,PAID $14 CASH,TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 15 DAYS,GAVE FOLDER TO NORA.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAYATS, BORIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC SERICES, INC. REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REQUEST IS DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICED SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
